title: Aureline work-item change-intent metadata vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the change_intent_record frozen in docs/work_items/change_intent_and_publish_preview_contract.md. One record family pins the rationale, target scope, linked-review relation, expected side effects, required approvals, and validation-evidence references for a single change a user (or AI assistant pending user confirmation) intends to make against a provider-owned (or local-only) work item, so that the intent remains visible across local draft, review, and publish steps rather than disappearing after the user first authored the change. The change-intent record carries the *why* and *what* of the change as opaque, typed structured fields; the *how* and *when* of the publish path is carried by the bound external_publish_preview_record (this directory's other schema) and the upstream status_transition_packet_record / publish_later_queue_item_record / browser_handoff_packet_record / offline_handoff_packet_record. Composes with (and does not replace) the work_item_detail_record schema (binds back through work_item_detail_record_id_ref); the provider-mode contract (re-exports predicted_side_effect_class, irreversibility_class, mutation_mode); the publish-later contract (cites publish_later_queue_item_record, provider_consequence_preview_record, account_mapping_binding_record, provider_callback_envelope_record on apply); the review-workspace / review-pack / change-stack contracts (cites review_workspace_record, review_pack_record, review_evaluation_result_record, change_object_record, patch_stack_record, branch_row, worktree_row); the browser-handoff packet (cites browser_handoff_packet_record on open_in_provider routes); the offline-handoff packet (cites offline_handoff_packet_record when the intent was captured under unavailability); and the status-transition packet (cites status_transition_packet_record on the previewed mutation that commits this intent). Raw provider URLs, raw provider issue bodies, raw comment bodies, raw label values that disclose customer / tenant identity, raw notification message bodies, raw delegated tokens, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, and raw stdout / stderr never cross this boundary regardless of redaction class. The eventual work-items crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record_kind, change_intent_lifecycle_class, intent_origin_class, target_scope_class, linked_review_relation_class, expected_side_effect_kind_class, approval_role_class, approval_state_class, validation_evidence_reference_class, denial_reason, or audit_event_id is additive-minor and bumps change_intent_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

change_intent_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the change-intent vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / queue-review rollups / admin-reconciliation consoles. Raw provider URLs, raw provider issue bodies, raw comment bodies, raw delegated tokens, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, and raw notification payloads never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary safe for support / audit / queue-review / admin-reconciliation surfaces; never carries the raw payload.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in preview, queue-review, and export review surfaces. Never carries the raw payload.

trust_posture.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state the change intent was authored under.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class re-exported from ADR-0010 / ADR-0007. Raw payloads never cross this boundary regardless of class.

predicted_side_effect_class.description: Predicted side-effect class re-exported verbatim from schemas/providers/publish_later_record.schema.json so change-intent records and queue items project onto the same axis.

irreversibility_class.description: Irreversibility class re-exported verbatim from schemas/providers/publish_later_record.schema.json. irreversible and irreversible_release_class side effects on a change intent MUST resolve to a pinned external_publish_preview_record before the intent's lifecycle reaches pinned_to_publish_preview / applied_publish_now / admitted_publish_later_queue / routed_browser_handoff.

notification_side_effect_class.description: Notification-side-effect class re-exported verbatim from schemas/work_items/status_transition_packet.schema.json. notification_unknown_until_publish_admitted_pending_review is the safe default when the publish path will route through a queue or browser handoff and the actual notification fan-out cannot be predicted before drain.

provider_field_class.description: Provider-field class re-exported verbatim from schemas/work_items/provider_object.schema.json. Names which provider-owned fields the intent expects to mutate. 'other_provider_owned_field' is repair-only.

validation_evidence_class.description: Validation-evidence class re-exported verbatim from schemas/work_items/work_item_detail.schema.json so a change-intent reuses one vocabulary for its evidence references.

change_intent_lifecycle_class.description: Frozen lifecycle class for the change-intent record. local_only_draft_intent is a freshly authored intent with no review / publish path attached; proposed_pending_review means the intent was published for review but no review link is bound yet; under_review_with_review_link means a typed linked_review_relation is attached; awaiting_publish_preview means the user has accepted the intent for publish but no preview is pinned yet; pinned_to_publish_preview means a typed external_publish_preview_record is bound; applied_publish_now / admitted_publish_later_queue / routed_browser_handoff / captured_offline_pending_drain mirror the four mutation_mode lanes of the bound status-transition packet; withdrawn_by_user, superseded_by_change_intent_record, and archived_after_close are terminal lifecycle states. The lifecycle is monotonic forward through proposed → under_review → awaiting_publish_preview → pinned_to_publish_preview → applied_publish_now / admitted_publish_later_queue / routed_browser_handoff / captured_offline_pending_drain; the record never silently disappears after creation.

intent_origin_class.description: Frozen intent-origin class. ai_proposed_pending_user_confirmation pins an AI-proposed intent that MUST be confirmed by a human before any apply path is admissible; the four imported_from_* lanes pin intents reconstructed from upstream artifacts; policy_admin_minted pins admin-injected intents (e.g. policy-driven reassignment).

target_scope_class.description: Frozen target-scope class. local_workspace_only_no_provider_target pins an intent that will never call the provider (e.g. local-draft title rename); the seven provider-target classes pin intents that will mutate provider state through one of the four mutation modes; cross_object_blocking_relationship_change covers blocking / depends-on / parent-of / duplicates relations across two work items; multi_object_batch_intent covers a single intent that fans out across multiple work items.

linked_review_relation_class.description: Frozen linked-review relation class. Re-uses the linked_review_class vocabulary from schemas/work_items/work_item_detail.schema.json so a change-intent's review relation is the same axis the work-item header reads; the relation survives export / support packets without being downgraded to a free-text note.

expected_side_effect_kind_class.description: Frozen expected-side-effect kind class. Names the *kind* of side effect the intent expects; the predicted_side_effect_class names the *axis* (inspect_only / local_reversible / external_irreversible_publish / etc.); together they pre-resolve what the user is committing to.

affected_provider_field_classes.description: Provider-field classes this side effect is expected to touch. Empty when the side effect does not directly mutate a provider-owned field (e.g. a local-only edit, a comment add, a release publish).

expected_side_effect_entry.description: One expected side effect of the change intent. The intent carries an ordered list; the apply path's status_transition_packet_record MUST resolve a transition_entry per side effect or else the intent's lifecycle MUST NOT advance past pinned_to_publish_preview.

approval_role_class.description: Frozen approval-role class. no_approval_required_local_only is admissible only on local_workspace_only_no_provider_target target_scope; release_manager is required on release_artifact_publish; security_review and compliance_review are required when policy narrows the target.

approval_state_class.description: Frozen approval-state class. Surfaces MUST render granted_then_revoked distinct from denied so users see the reason a previously-admissible intent is now blocked.

approval_subject_ref.description: Opaque ref to the actor subject expected to approve. Empty when the role is satisfied at the role level rather than by a named actor (e.g. any code_owner on the linked branch).

approval_granted_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp the approval was granted at. Empty when approval_state_class is not_required, pending, or denied.

approval_revoked_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp the approval was revoked at. Required when approval_state_class is granted_then_revoked; empty otherwise.

allOf.description: granted_then_revoked approvals MUST cite an approval_revoked_at timestamp so the user can see when and (via summary) why the approval was revoked.

required_approval_entry.description: One required-approval entry. The intent carries an ordered list; the lifecycle MUST NOT reach applied_publish_now / admitted_publish_later_queue / routed_browser_handoff while any required entry is pending or denied or granted_then_revoked.

linked_validation_evidence_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound validation-evidence record (review_evaluation_result_record / qa_run_record / check_run_imported_snapshot_record / evidence_packet_record / support_bundle_record / incident_workspace_packet_record). Required non-empty when validation_evidence_class is one of the linked_* values; empty when no_validation_evidence_attached or imported_handoff_evidence_only_no_refresh_path.

allOf.description: linked_* validation_evidence_class values MUST cite a non-empty linked_validation_evidence_record_id_ref so a downstream surface can chase the upstream record without guessing.

validation_evidence_reference_entry.description: One validation-evidence reference. The intent carries an ordered list; entries MAY be added, detached, or replaced through the audit stream (change_intent_validation_evidence_attached / change_intent_validation_evidence_detached) without losing the intent's lifecycle position.

next_safe_action_class.description: Next-safe-action hint surfaces render. MUST resolve to one entry per record; the lifecycle gates which actions are admissible (e.g. pin_publish_preview is admissible only on awaiting_publish_preview lifecycle, no_action_archived_after_close on archived_after_close).

origin_disclosure.description: Canonical Aureline origin the change intent was authored under. Reused identically by the work_item_detail / status_transition_packet / external_publish_preview schemas.

policy_context.description: Policy context the change intent was authored under. Revalidated on every lifecycle advance and on every external_publish_preview pin.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason vocabulary. silent_publish_under_local_only_target_scope_forbidden gates a record from claiming local_workspace_only_no_provider_target while citing any provider-bound apply ref; change_intent_must_not_disappear_after_creation gates a surface from dropping an authored intent without an explicit withdrawn_by_user / superseded_by_change_intent_record / archived_after_close lifecycle transition.

audit_event_id.description: Closed audit-event vocabulary for the change-intent lifecycle. Provider-side events stay on the ADR-0010 provider_handoff stream; this stream is the local-only change-intent lifecycle stream.

work_item_detail_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound work_item_detail_record the intent applies to. Required so the intent never floats free of a work-item row.

rationale_summary.description: Reviewable rationale: why the user (or AI assistant pending user confirmation, or admin policy) wants this change. Required on every intent so the intent surface MUST NOT collapse the rationale into a generic 'Edit' button label.

linked_review_workspace_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound review_workspace_record. Required when linked_review_relation_class is linked_review_workspace_local_truth_only or linked_review_workspace_with_provider_overlay.

linked_review_pack_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound review_pack_record. Required (or paired with linked_review_evaluation_result_record_id_ref) when linked_review_relation_class is linked_review_pack_evaluation.

linked_review_evaluation_result_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound review_evaluation_result_record. Required (or paired with linked_review_pack_record_id_ref) when linked_review_relation_class is linked_review_pack_evaluation.

linked_review_anchor_record_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to bound review_anchor_records when reviewer comments anchor back to the change intent.

linked_browser_handoff_review_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to a bound browser_handoff_packet_record when the linked review is reachable only through the system browser. Required when linked_review_relation_class is linked_browser_handoff_review_token_only.

linked_change_object_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound change_object_record (change-stack contract). Empty when no change object is bound.

linked_patch_stack_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound patch_stack_record (change-stack contract). Empty when no patch stack is bound.

linked_branch_local_locator_ref.description: Opaque ref to the local branch / worktree source-locator row. Empty when the intent does not bind a local branch.

expected_side_effects.description: Ordered list of expected side effects. At minimum one entry is required so the intent always discloses at least one expected side effect rather than presenting a generic 'will change something' label.

required_approvals.description: Required approvals. Empty array is admissible only when target_scope_class is local_workspace_only_no_provider_target; otherwise at least one entry is required.

validation_evidence_references.description: Validation-evidence references. Empty array is admissible (an early-stage local-draft intent may not yet have evidence attached) but the lifecycle MUST NOT reach pinned_to_publish_preview without at least one entry when target_scope_class is release_artifact_publish.

linked_external_publish_preview_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound external_publish_preview_record. Required when change_intent_lifecycle_class is pinned_to_publish_preview, applied_publish_now, admitted_publish_later_queue, routed_browser_handoff, or captured_offline_pending_drain.

linked_status_transition_packet_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound status_transition_packet_record (the previewed mutation that commits the intent). Required when change_intent_lifecycle_class is applied_publish_now, admitted_publish_later_queue, routed_browser_handoff, or captured_offline_pending_drain.

linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound publish_later_queue_item_record. Required when change_intent_lifecycle_class is admitted_publish_later_queue or captured_offline_pending_drain.

linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound browser_handoff_packet_record. Required when change_intent_lifecycle_class is routed_browser_handoff.

linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_.description: Opaque ref to the bound offline_handoff_packet_record. Required when change_intent_lifecycle_class is captured_offline_pending_drain.

linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id.description: Opaque ref to the bound account_mapping_binding_record when the intent's apply path resolves under a pending or recently-resolved account mapping. Empty when no mapping is bound.

linked_provider_callback_envelope_record.description: Opaque refs to provider_callback_envelope_records that observed the intent's apply path. Empty when no callback has been observed (e.g. local-only / awaiting-preview / withdrawn).

supersedes_change_intent_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to a prior change_intent_record this one supersedes (e.g. after the user re-authored the intent under a fresh review link). Empty when this is a fresh intent.

superseded_by_change_intent_record_id_re.description: Opaque ref to a successor change_intent_record. Required when change_intent_lifecycle_class is superseded_by_change_intent_record.

withdrawn_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp the intent was withdrawn at. Required when change_intent_lifecycle_class is withdrawn_by_user; empty otherwise.

archived_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp the intent was archived at. Required when change_intent_lifecycle_class is archived_after_close; empty otherwise.

allOf.description: pinned_to_publish_preview / applied_publish_now / admitted_publish_later_queue / routed_browser_handoff / captured_offline_pending_drain MUST cite a non-empty linked_external_publish_preview_record_id_ref so the user, queue-review, and support-export consumers can always chase the preview the intent committed to.

applied_publish_now / admitted_publish_later_queue / routed_browser_handoff / captured_offline_pending_drain MUST cite a non-empty linked_status_transition_packet_record_id_ref so the previewed mutation that commits the intent is always reachable.
routed_browser_handoff MUST cite a non-empty linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.

captured_offline_pending_drain MUST cite a non-empty linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_ref AND a non-empty linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_id_ref so the captured intent has both the offline carrier and the queue item the drain path will reopen.
under_review_with_review_link MUST cite a linked_review_relation_class outside no_linked_review so the review relation is always typed (never a free-text note).
linked_review_workspace_local_truth_only and linked_review_workspace_with_provider_overlay MUST cite a non-empty linked_review_workspace_record_id_ref.
linked_review_pack_evaluation MUST cite a non-empty linked_review_pack_record_id_ref OR a non-empty linked_review_evaluation_result_record_id_ref.
linked_browser_handoff_review_token_only MUST cite a non-empty linked_browser_handoff_review_packet_ref.

local_workspace_only_no_provider_target target_scope MUST forbid provider-bound apply refs (external publish preview, publish-later queue item, browser-handoff packet, offline-handoff packet) so silent provider mutation under a local-only label is impossible.
superseded_by_change_intent_record lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty superseded_by_change_intent_record_id_ref so the audit trail preserves the supersession chain.
withdrawn_by_user lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty withdrawn_at timestamp.
archived_after_close lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty archived_at timestamp AND resolve next_safe_action_class to no_action_archived_after_close.
release_artifact_publish target_scope MUST cite at least one required_approval entry whose approval_role_class is release_manager.

Any expected_side_effect entry whose irreversibility_class is irreversible or irreversible_release_class MUST cite a non-empty linked_external_publish_preview_record_id_ref so the user can never commit an irreversible side effect without a pinned preview.

Any provider-bound target_scope (everything except local_workspace_only_no_provider_target) MUST cite at least one required_approval entry; no_approval_required_local_only is admissible only on local_workspace_only_no_provider_target.

change_intent_record.description: Frozen change-intent record. The record carries the *why* and *what* of the intended change as opaque, typed structured fields and survives across local draft, review, and publish steps; the *how* and *when* of the publish path lives on the bound external_publish_preview_record and the upstream status_transition_packet / publish_later_queue_item / browser_handoff_packet / offline_handoff_packet records cited by reference.

allOf.description: change_intent_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a denial reason.

change_intent_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row for the change-intent lifecycle. Denial events MUST cite a typed reason from the closed denial vocabulary; lifecycle events (authored, proposed, review-link attached / detached, validation-evidence attached / detached, approval added / granted / denied / revoked, awaiting / pinned to publish preview, applied / admitted / routed / captured, withdrawn / superseded / archived) carry no denial reason.
